params._deputyGuardianModule: Address of the DeputyGuardianModule used by the SC Safe.
params._deputySignature: Signature from the deputy verifying that the account is an EOA.

deputyAuthMessageTypehash().notice: Getter function for the DeputyAuth message typehash.

deputyGuardianModule().notice: Address of the DeputyGuardianModule used by the SC Safe.

foundationSafe().notice: Getter function for the Foundation Safe address.

pause(bytes32,bytes).notice: Calls the Foundation Safe's `execTransactionFromModuleReturnData()` function with         the arguments necessary to call `pause()` on the Security Council Safe, which will         then cause the Security Council Safe to trigger SuperchainConfig pause.         Front-running this function is completely safe, it'll pause either way.

pauseMessageTypehash().notice: Getter function for the Pause message typehash.

superchainConfig().notice: Getter function for the SuperchainConfig address.

deputyAuthMessageTypehash().notice: Getter function for the DeputyAuth message typehash.

deputyGuardianModule().notice: Address of the DeputyGuardianModule used by the SC Safe.

foundationSafe().notice: Getter function for the Foundation Safe address.

pause(bytes32,bytes).notice: Calls the Foundation Safe's `execTransactionFromModuleReturnData()` function with         the arguments necessary to call `pause()` on the Security Council Safe, which will         then cause the Security Council Safe to trigger SuperchainConfig pause.         Front-running this function is completely safe, it'll pause either way.

pauseMessageTypehash().notice: Getter function for the Pause message typehash.

superchainConfig().notice: Getter function for the SuperchainConfig address.

DeputyGuardianModuleSet(address).notice: Event emitted when the DeputyGuardianModule is set.

DeputySet(address).notice: Event emitted when the deputy address is set.

PauseTriggered(address,bytes32).notice: Event emitted when the pause is triggered.

DeputyPauseModule_ExecutionFailed(string.notice: Error message for failed transaction execution.

DeputyPauseModule_InvalidDeputy().notice: Error message for deputy being invalid.

DeputyPauseModule_InvalidDeputyGuardianM.notice: Error message for the DeputyGuardianModule being invalid.

DeputyPauseModule_NotFromSafe().notice: Error message for the call not being from the Foundation Safe.

DeputyPauseModule_SuperchainNotPaused().notice: Error message for the SuperchainConfig not being paused.

userdoc.notice: Safe Module designed to be installed in the Foundation Safe which allows a specific         deputy address to act as the Foundation Safe for the sake of triggering the         Superchain-wide pause functionality. Significantly simplifies the process of triggering         a Superchain-wide pause without changing the existing security model.

params._deputyGuardianModule: Address of the DeputyGuardianModule used by the SC Safe.
params._deputySignature: Signature from the deputy verifying that the account is an EOA.

EIP712DomainChanged().details: MAY be emitted to signal that the domain could have changed.

ECDSAInvalidSignatureLength(uint256).details: The signature has an invalid length.

ECDSAInvalidSignatureS(bytes32).details: The signature has an S value that is in the upper half order.
